title: Rc Creeper Mod
description: This mod adds remote controlled creepers(which can explode!)
body:
This mod adds remote controllable creepers and remotes to the game(powered by redstone & explode with gunpowder).

1. Spawn a creeper using the creeper BEACON
2. Right click the creeper using the remote to bind
3. Press V to switch perspective
4. Maneuver using wasd + mouse
5. Switch back to player view using v & sneek right click to explode the creeper(requires gunpowder in player inventory).
